title: Mean Reversion After Overextension Inside Bull Trend -- IS baseline (NQ daily 2013-2022)

s27_d2_pre_screen.note: Gates pre-registered in S27-D2 BEFORE any result was seen. Compared here, not changed.

top3_removal_positive.pass_threshold: IS net stays positive after removing top 3 winners

max_dd_assessment.rule: IS max DD <= IS net R (pass); > 1.5x IS net R (fail)
max_dd_assessment.note: Net R is negative, so the DD<=net-R relationship is moot; the binding failures are net loss, the sub-25 trade count, sub-1.10 PF, negative expectancy, and the failed top-3 gate.

verdict_basis: IS net R is NEGATIVE (-1.75R) -- the strategy loses money in-sample even WITH its winners.
Trade count 18 is below the pre-registered hard FAIL floor (<25).
Profit factor 0.84 is below the FAIL threshold (<1.10).
Expectancy is negative (-0.0973R/trade); the pass gate required > 0.
Positive years 3/10 is below the FAIL floor (<5/10).
Anti-Donchian top-3 gate FAILS: removing the 3 best trades drops net to -6.25R (already negative WITH them).
Multiple independent pre-registered hard floors are breached simultaneously.

conservative_interpretation.IS_CONTINUE_means: IS baseline is acceptable; it does NOT mean OOS will pass. Would still require a pre-registered OOS protocol before any OOS look.
conservative_interpretation.IS_WATCH_means: Minor misses only; continue ONLY if the evidence clearly justifies committing an OOS protocol.
conservative_interpretation.IS_FAIL_means: Park or redesign as a NEW branch. Do NOT tune, sweep, or relax any S27 parameter to rescue this branch.

recommendation: STOP and PARK S27. The IS baseline fails multiple pre-registered hard floors and is net-negative in-sample. Per the S27-D2 anti-overfit rules, do NOT optimize, sweep, or relax parameters to rescue it; any future variant must be a NEW branch with its own frozen pre-registration. Do NOT pre-register or run the S27-D5 OOS protocol -- there is no IS edge to validate out-of-sample.
trading_recommendation: NONE. IS baseline only, and it FAILED. No deployment, no paper, no live. S26 and Donchian stay PARKED; S27 is recommended for PARK.
